summary: Iteration_17 regression smoke test PASSED 100%. Verified that adding /app/.dockerignore (and removal of /app/frontend/build & /app/frontend-next) caused zero regression in the live preview environment. All 8 smoke checks (7 functional + 1 filesystem) green. Live app is unaffected since /app/frontend supervisor runs CRA dev server (yarn start) which does not consult .dockerignore.

smoke_results.1_homepage_wizard: PASS - / returns 200, title='The Local Jewel | Custom Quote'. 'Get me a quote' CTA present, paste-link input present, mega menu shows Engagement Rings (6 ER references confirming nav + collection links). 0 console errors during navigation.
smoke_results.2_pdp_5_carat_oval: PASS - /projects/5-carat-oval-solitaire-engagement-ring renders with [data-testid=v2-title], [data-testid=v2-fast-badge], [data-testid=v2-add-to-bag], hero image, metal selectors (Silver/10K/14K/18K/Platinum), carat selectors (1ct..4ct), price $1,800+, IGI Certified badge. 6 JSON-LD blocks via react-helmet-async: Organization, WebSite, Organization, WebSite, Product, BreadcrumbList — Product and BreadcrumbList both confirmed.
smoke_results.3_collection_engagement_rings: PASS - /collections/engagement-rings rendered with 2 [data-testid^=product-card] cards. No Helmet 'expects a string as a child of <title>' error. 0 console errors.
smoke_results.4_products_redirect: PASS - /products/5-carat-oval-solitaire-engagement-ring client-side redirected to /projects/5-carat-oval-solitaire-engagement-ring as expected.
smoke_results.5_admin_login: PASS - /admin/login → submit ansh@thelocaljewel.com / Rakesh@2709 → lands on /admin (analytics dashboard, 3 Analytics/Dashboard/Overview indicators).
smoke_results.6_otp_login: PASS - /login → filled smoke17@example.com → Send code → [data-testid=otp-display-code]='394169' → otp-login-otp-input filled → Verify → /dashboard rendered with [data-testid=account-overview] (Hi, smoke17; Overview tab; Custom quotes / Orders / Messages tiles).
smoke_results.7_backend_seo_endpoints: PASS - GET /robots.txt → 200 (3155 bytes), /llms.txt → 200 (1978 bytes), /api/sitemap.xml → 200 (2419 bytes, contains 3 /projects/ URLs), /api/settings/public → 200, /api/projects → 200.
smoke_results.8_filesystem_check: PASS - /app/.dockerignore exists with all expected exclusions (node_modules, .git, build, .next, .pytest_cache, .ruff_cache, test_reports, frontend-next, memory, etc.). /app/frontend/build does NOT exist. /app/frontend-next does NOT exist.

test_credentials: Admin ansh@thelocaljewel.com / Rakesh@2709 verified. Customer OTP via [data-testid=otp-display-code] verified.
seed_data_creation: Created ephemeral customer 'smoke17@example.com' via OTP flow during test (no cleanup required).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration_17 was a pure deploy-context regression smoke check after adding /app/.dockerignore. The live preview is fully green and identical in behavior to iterations 15 and 16. /app/frontend supervisor runs CRA dev server (yarn start), which does not consult .dockerignore — the .dockerignore only affects the Emergent build pipeline's docker context. User can safely re-trigger the Emergent production deploy. If Step #34 still fails with the .dockerignore in place, the issue is on the Emergent platform side (R2 upload infra) and they should contact Emergent support.
rca of the issue: N/A - regression smoke test only; root-cause already mitigated by main agent: missing .dockerignore caused 818 MB build context (node_modules 1.9 GB + .git 161 MB) that overwhelmed the Cloudflare R2 upload step. Adding /app/.dockerignore reduces context to ~26 MB.
